who: small accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter
offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter, the complexity of tax regulations causes late filings. We generate compliance filings instead of manual filing processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely and accurate quarterly tax compliance filings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where firms share tools
try_it: Let users test user-friendly interface for data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
